state.next-action: PHASE 22 SESSION 7: YAML fix + full cross-runtime install via install.js. Session 7: (1) Fixed YAML errors in create-skill and objective-eval-design SKILL.md — descriptions contained unquoted colons which js-yaml parses as key separators. Replaced plain scalar `description: ...` with folded block scalar `description: >- ...` which treats the body as opaque. Validated all 5 session-authored skills (create-skill, find-sprites, framework-upgrade, objective-eval-design, portfolio-sync) now parse clean. (2) Updated skills/create-skill/SKILL.md body to document the YAML frontmatter discipline so future skill authors use the folded block scalar pattern. (3) Ran vendor/get-anything-done/bin/install.js (the existing GSD-pattern installer supporting --claude --cursor --codex --all). Installer crashed partway through because its path resolution assumes an npm-published layout (expects vendor/get-anything-done/get-anything-done/). Before crash it successfully installed skills but deleted .claude/commands/gad/ and .claude/hooks/statusline.js. (4) Restored manually: copied commands into .claude/.cursor/.codex (60 each), copied 21 agents into .cursor/.codex/agents (already in .claude), copied 27 skills into .cursor/.codex/skills (already in .claude). Cleaned up .claude/get-anything-done/ installer artifact. (5) Final state: all three runtimes (.claude .cursor .codex) have 27 skills + 21 agents + 60 commands. Claude Code system reminder confirms all GAD skills load with no YAML errors. (6) Known: install.js has a path resolution bug for local (non-npm) checkouts — task 22-34 added to fix install.js, task 22-33 remains as the `gad install` CLI wrapper plan. NEXT SESSION: run /gad:execute-phase 25 or /gad:execute-phase 27 to ship trace v4 hooks or rubric work.
